title: AtoZ Ella Party Doll with Sequin Dress and Princess Accessories, Age 3+, Pink
features: COMPLETE SET: Fashion doll comes with a stunning sequin party dress and matching princess-themed accessories for endless dress-up play
ROYAL ACCESSORIES: Includes a beautiful tiara crown and three magical wands with heart-shaped crystal details
GLAMOROUS DESIGN: Features an elegant strapless dress with shimmering sequin pattern in various stylish colour options
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, perfect for imaginative play and collecting
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Manufactured by AtoZ with attention to detail and durability for long-lasting enjoyment
description: Product Description Introducing the AtoZ Ella Party Doll, a delightful playset that brings glamour and sparkle to playtime! Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this fashionable doll comes dressed in stunning sequin party dresses that catch and reflect light beautifully. The set includes multiple dress variations featuring eye-catching designs in gold, white, pink, and red sequins, each with elegant lace trim detailing. Adding to the magical experience are the royal accessories - a glittering tiara crown and three decorative wands with heart-shaped jewels in purple, blue, and pink. Each wand and crown is crafted with intricate details and crystal-like elements that complement the doll's party-ready appearance. The doll features articulated limbs for dynamic posing, long styled blonde hair, and comes in an attractive pink-themed display box decorated with butterflies and sparkles. This party doll set offers endless opportunities for imaginative play and dress-up adventures, making it an ideal gift for young fashion enthusiasts and aspiring princesses. Safety Warning Warning : Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
